message:
feat: add todo dispatcher mode for shared task queue (#116)

Add a side panel with a FIFO task queue that tiles consume autonomously.
When "Todo Mode" is ON, idle tiles auto-consume the next pending item.

New files:
- server/src/prompt-detector.ts: Debounced prompt detection on PTY output
- server/src/todo-store.ts: Server-side persistence (~/.copilot-remote/todo.json)
- web/src/hooks/useTodoDispatcher.ts: State management and dispatch logic
- web/src/components/TodoPanel.tsx: Side panel UI with queue management

Modified:
- server/src/terminal-manager.ts: Feed PTY data to prompt detector
- server/src/index.ts: Wire prompt events, add GET/PUT /api/todos endpoints
- web/src/types.ts: Add TodoItem and TodoStatus types
- web/src/lib/api.ts: Add getTodos/saveTodos API methods
- web/src/components/TerminalView.tsx: Integrate hook, panel, keyboard shortcut

Closes #114

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
